_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Design, implement, assess, and evaluate secure interfaces between information systems, physical systems, and/or embedded technologies.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to assess and communicate the security implications of emerging AI technologies, including foundation models, autonomous agents, and AI-generated content, to both technical and executive audiences.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-A-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-T-001 (SP, cosine: 0.491), DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.473).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.7/10 (raw 0.468). Shared vocabulary: [assess, technologies]. DCWF-only terms [design, embedded, evaluate, implement, information, interfaces] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, agents, ai, audiences, autonomous, communicate] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.870 (P=0.875, R=0.864). Balanced P/R — the 15-word DCWF element and 26-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Design, implement, assess, and evaluate secure interfaces between information sy" and "Ability to assess and communicate the security implications of emerging AI techn" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.496 ≈ STS 0.468 (gap 0.028). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [assess, technologies] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.8%. Shared tokens: [assess, technologies]. DCWF-only: [design, embedded, evaluate, implement, information, interfaces]. WIDAI-only: [ability, agents, ai, audiences, autonomous, communicate].
